title: New ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure
description: Security researchers have identified a new ransomware variant specifically designed to target cloud-based infrastructure. The campaign uses compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure poses a significant threat to organizations relying on cloud services. By exploiting compromised CI/CD pipelines, attackers can deploy malicious code, potentially leading to data encryption, service outages, and financial losses.
recommended_actions: Implement strict access controls and multi-factor authentication (MFA) for CI/CD pipelines to prevent unauthorized access.
Regularly audit and monitor CI/CD pipelines for suspicious activity or unauthorized changes.
Ensure robust backup strategies are in place, including offline backups, and test recovery procedures to minimize downtime in case of an attack.

title: Show HN: Open-source vulnerability scanner
description: New tool automatically scans dependencies for known vulnerabilities and suggests patches. Gaining traction in the security community.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity.

title: A vulnerability was detected in itsourcecode Online Doctor Appointment System 1.0. This issue...
description: A vulnerability was detected in itsourcecode Online Doctor Appointment System 1.0. This issue affects some unknown processing of the file /admin/appointment_action.php. The manipulation of the argument appointment_id results in sql injection. The attack can be launched remotely. The exploit is now public and may be used.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-4473.

title: A security vulnerability has been detected in itsourcecode Online Frozen Foods Ordering System 1...
description: A security vulnerability has been detected in itsourcecode Online Frozen Foods Ordering System 1.0. This vulnerability affects unknown code of the file /admin/admin_edit_supplier.php. The manipulation of the argument Supplier_Name leads to sql injection. The attack can be initiated remotely. The exploit has been disclosed publicly and may be used.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows remote attackers to exploit SQL injection in the Online Frozen Foods Ordering System, potentially leading to unauthorized access, data leakage, or database manipulation.
recommended_actions: Immediately apply input validation and parameterized queries to sanitize user inputs in the affected script (/admin/admin_edit_supplier.php).
Update the Online Frozen Foods Ordering System to the latest version if a patch addressing CVE-2026-4472 is available.
Monitor system logs for unusual activity, particularly related to the 'Supplier_Name' parameter, and implement a web application firewall (WAF) to block malicious requests.

title: The Membership Plugin – Restrict Content plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Unvalidated...
description: The Membership Plugin – Restrict Content plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Unvalidated Redirect in all versions up to, and including, 3.2.24. This is due to insufficient validation on the redirect url supplied via the 'rcp_redirect' parameter. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to redirect users with the password reset email to potentially malicious sites if they can successfully trick them into performing an action.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-4136.

title: A security flaw has been discovered in itsourcecode Online Frozen Foods Ordering System 1.0....
description: A security flaw has been discovered in itsourcecode Online Frozen Foods Ordering System 1.0. Affected by this issue is some unknown functionality of the file /admin/admin_edit_menu.php. Performing a manipulation of the argument product_name results in sql injection. It is possible to initiate the attack remotely. The exploit has been released to the public and may be used for attacks.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows attackers to exploit SQL injection via the 'product_name' parameter in the admin panel, potentially leading to unauthorized access, data exfiltration, or database manipulation. Since the exploit is public, the risk of exploitation is significantly increased.
recommended_actions: Immediately apply input sanitization and parameterized queries to mitigate SQL injection vulnerabilities in the affected file.
Restrict public access to the admin panel by implementing IP whitelisting and multi-factor authentication (MFA).
Update or patch the application to a secure version if an official fix is released by the vendor.

title: The Aimogen Pro plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Arbitrary Function Call that can lead to...
description: The Aimogen Pro plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Arbitrary Function Call that can lead to privilege escalation due to a missing capability check on the 'aiomatic_call_ai_function_realtime' function in all versions up to, and including, 2.7.5. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to call arbitrary WordPress functions such as 'update_option' to update the default role for registration to administrator and enable user registration for attackers to gain administrative user acces

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-4038.

title: A weakness has been identified in itsourcecode Online Frozen Foods Ordering System 1.0. This...
description: A weakness has been identified in itsourcecode Online Frozen Foods Ordering System 1.0. This affects an unknown part of the file /admin/admin_edit_employee.php. Executing a manipulation of the argument First_Name can lead to sql injection. It is possible to launch the attack remotely. The exploit has been made available to the public and could be used for attacks.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The identified SQL injection vulnerability in the itsourcecode Online Frozen Foods Ordering System 1.0 could allow attackers to manipulate database queries, potentially leading to unauthorized access, data exfiltration, or data corruption. Since the exploit is publicly available, the risk of exploitation is significantly increased.
recommended_actions: Immediately apply input validation and sanitization for all user inputs, especially the 'First_Name' parameter.
Update or patch the affected system to address the SQL injection vulnerability, if a fix is available from the vendor.
Monitor system logs and database activity for any signs of suspicious or unauthorized access attempts.

title: A vulnerability was determined in Comfast CF-AC100 2.6.0.8. Affected is an unknown function of...
description: A vulnerability was determined in Comfast CF-AC100 2.6.0.8. Affected is an unknown function of the file /cgi-bin/mbox-config?method=SET&section=update_interface_png. This manipulation causes command injection. The attack is possible to be carried out remotely. The exploit has been publicly disclosed and may be utilized. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way.

Successful attacks of this vulnerability can resu

title: A flaw has been found in D-Link DIR-513 1.10. The impacted element is an unknown function of the...
description: A flaw has been found in D-Link DIR-513 1.10. The impacted element is an unknown function of the file /goform/formSysCmd. Executing a manipulation of the argument sysCmd can lead to os command injection. The attack may be launched remotely. The exploit has been published and may be used. This vulnerability only affects products that are no longer supported by the maintainer.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in D-Link DIR-513 1.10 allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary OS commands via the sysCmd parameter, potentially leading to full system compromise. This could be exploited to gain unauthorized access, disrupt services, or exfiltrate sensitive data.
recommended_actions: Immediately replace or decommission affected devices, as they are no longer supported by the vendor and will not receive security patches.
Implement network segmentation to isolate vulnerable devices from critical systems and sensitive data.
Monitor network traffic for unusual activity and apply firewall rules to block unauthorized access to the affected endpoint.

recommended_actions: Update Google Chrome to version 146.0.7680.153 or later to mitigate the vulnerability.
Monitor systems for unusual activity or signs of exploitation, especially in applications using WebRTC.
Educate users about the risks of interacting with untrusted or suspicious HTML pages.

description: Use after free in Digital Credentials API in Google Chrome prior to 146.0.7680.153 allowed a remote attacker who had compromised the renderer process to potentially perform a sandbox escape via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows a remote attacker to potentially escape the Chrome sandbox by exploiting a use-after-free flaw in the Digital Credentials API, which could lead to arbitrary code execution or further compromise of the system.
recommended_actions: Immediately update Google Chrome to version 146.0.7680.153 or later to mitigate the vulnerability.
Enable automatic updates for browsers across all systems to ensure timely patching of future vulnerabilities.
Implement endpoint detection and response (EDR) solutions to monitor and mitigate potential exploitation attempts.

title: CVE-2025-14811 - IBM Sterling Partner Engagement Manager 6.2.3.0 through 6.2.3.5 and 6.2.4.0 through 6.2.4.2 could al
description: IBM Sterling Partner Engagement Manager 6.2.3.0 through 6.2.3.5 and 6.2.4.0 through 6.2.4.2 could allow an attacker to obtain sensitive information from the query string of an HTTP GET method to process a request which could be obtained using man in the middle techniques.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows attackers to intercept sensitive information via HTTP GET query strings, potentially exposing confidential data during transmission. This risk is amplified if encryption (e.g., HTTPS) is not properly implemented.
recommended_actions: Ensure all communications between clients and servers use HTTPS to encrypt data in transit.
Upgrade IBM Sterling Partner Engagement Manager to the latest version that addresses CVE-2025-14811.
Implement network monitoring tools to detect potential man-in-the-middle (MITM) attacks.

title: CVE-2025-14504 - IBM Sterling B2B Integrator and IBM Sterling File Gateway 6.1.0.0 through 6.1.2.7_2, 6.2.0.0 through
description: IBM Sterling B2B Integrator and IBM Sterling File Gateway 6.1.0.0 through 6.1.2.7_2, 6.2.0.0 through 6.2.0.5_1, 6.2.1.0 through 6.2.1.1_1, and 6.2.2.0 is vulnerable to cross-site scripting. This vulnerability allows an authenticated user to embed arbitrary JavaScript code in the Web UI thus altering the intended functionality potentially leading to credentials disclosure within a trusted session.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2025-14504.

title: CVE-2025-14483 - IBM Sterling B2B Integrator and IBM Sterling File Gateway 6.1.0.0 through 6.1.2.7_2, 6.2.0.0 through
description: IBM Sterling B2B Integrator and IBM Sterling File Gateway 6.1.0.0 through 6.1.2.7_2, 6.2.0.0 through 6.2.0.5_1, 6.2.1.0 through 6.2.1.1_1, and 6.2.2.0 could disclose sensitive host information to authenticated users in responses that could be used in further attacks against the system.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability could allow authenticated users to access sensitive host information, potentially enabling further targeted attacks such as privilege escalation, lateral movement, or data exfiltration.
recommended_actions: Apply the latest patches or updates provided by IBM to address CVE-2025-14483.
Restrict access to the affected systems by implementing strict access controls and limiting user privileges to the minimum necessary.
Monitor system logs for any unusual or unauthorized access patterns that could indicate exploitation attempts.

title: CVE-2025-12455 - Observable response discrepancy vulnerability in OpenText™ Vertica allows Password Brute Forcing.
description:
Observable response discrepancy vulnerability in OpenText™ Vertica allows Password Brute Forcing.  
The vulnerability could lead to Password Brute Forcing in Vertica management console application.This issue affects Vertica: from 10.0 through 10.X, from 11.0 through 11.X, from 12.0 through 12.X.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2025-12455.

title: CVE-2025-12454 - Improper neutralization of input during web page generation ('cross-site scripting') vulnerability i
description:
Improper neutralization of input during web page generation ('cross-site scripting') vulnerability in OpenText™ Vertica allows Reflected XSS. 
The vulnerability could lead to Reflected XSS attack of cross-site scripting in Vertica management console application.This issue affects Vertica: from 10.0 through 10.X, from 11.0 through 11.X, from 12.0 through 12.X, from 23.0 through 23.X, from 24.0 through 24.X, from 25.1.0 through 25.1.X.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2025-12454.
